# ToolCall Witness MCP

Paid remote MCP for agent tool-call receipts, approval evidence, arguments redaction, result summaries, and review exports.

Website: https://toolcallwitness.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://toolcallwitness.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://toolcallwitness.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/tool-call-witness-mcp

Use case: A witness layer for AI agent tool calls.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: create_witness_receipt, check_approval_rule, summarize_risk_timeline, export_audit_receipt
